revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡製鉄所]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q97379379]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Yawata Steel Works''' or '''Yawata Iron and Steel Works''' (八幡製鉄所, やはたせいてつしょ, やわたせいてつしょ) refers to the steelworks located in Yahata-Higashi Ward, Kitakyushu City, Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan.
* [[:en:Yahata Steel Works|Government-owned Yawata Steel Works]]
* Former name of {{ill|Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|ja|日本製鉄九州製鉄所八幡地区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本製鉄九州製鉄所|1=Nippon Steel Kyushu Works|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311572}}

'''Yawata Steel Works''' or '''Yawata Iron and Steel Works''' (八幡製鉄所, やはたせいてつしょ, やわたせいてつしょ) refers to the steelworks located in Yahata-Higashi Ward, Kitakyushu City, Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan.
* [[:en:Yahata Steel Works|Government-owned Yawata Steel Works]]
* Former name of {{ill|Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|ja|日本製鉄九州製鉄所八幡地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本製鉄九州製鉄所|1=Nippon Steel Kyushu Works|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311572}}

'''Yawata Steel Works''' or '''Yawata Iron and Steel Works''' (八幡製鉄所, やはたせいてつしょ, やわたせいてつしょ) refers to the steelworks located in Yahata-Higashi Ward, Kitakyushu City, Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan.
* {{ill|Yahata Steel Works|en|Yahata Steel Works|WD=Q2943310|lt=Government-owned Yawata Steel Works}}
* Former name of {{ill|Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|ja|日本製鉄九州製鉄所八幡地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nippon Steel Kyushu Steel Works Yahata District|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本製鉄九州製鉄所|1=Nippon Steel Kyushu Works|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311572}}
